reviews.review_title: This game is so bad. Fix your game dude.
reviews.review_description:
I really want to speak to the owner of this game, why? First of all, the thumbnail is clearly AI because it has obvious AI shading. You literally could have atleast tried to make a thumbnail that was not lazily made with “Make a monkey wearing a VR” that’s just slop. Second of all. The disco effects and whatever makes playing the game ALMOST IMPOSSIBLE to play if you have slight motion sickness. I literally started gagging because I was becoming sick. Third of all, there are only 3 maps and they all look skidded/pulled from sketchfab (forgot to mention that the face of the monkey is also AI generated) 4th of all the mod vents don’t even have a playfab. So literally anyone can go in the vents and get free items and the mod menu just like that. 5th and the last is that you should actually develop the game and take this review as a lesson and don’t be crying because I gave 1 star. Use this review to actually make the game better. I hope you are reading this and I hope you respond.

Add me on Meta or talk to me on YT.

YT: 64KLACKS

Please fix the game.
Tis is litteraly the best game... MONKE
